compilerOptions:
  target: ES2022
  module: ESNext
  moduleResolution: bundler
  strict: true
  esModuleInterop: true
  skipLibCheck: true
  forceConsistentCasingInFileNames: true
  resolveJsonModule: true
  declaration: true
  declarationMap: true
  sourceMap: true
  outDir: ./dist
  rootDir: ./src
  baseUrl: .
  paths:
    "@/*"[1]: ./src/*
    "@components/*"[1]: ./src/components/*
    "@utils/*"[1]: ./src/utils/*
    "@types/*"[1]: ./src/types/*
  lib[3]: ES2022,DOM,DOM.Iterable
  jsx: react-jsx
  incremental: true
  tsBuildInfoFile: ./dist/.tsbuildinfo
include[2]: src/**/*.ts,src/**/*.tsx
exclude[3]: node_modules,dist,**/*.test.ts
